prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科组最低位次依次为2028→1718→1063→921→821名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计上升约242名；2025年基准位次约821名，为近5年最高水平；2021–2023年理科计划均为44人，2024–2025年物理类计划增至46人；2026年物理类计划51人，较2025年扩招5人（+10.87%），扩招幅度较大，对位次有下移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在Top15–17（2026年第15名），属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对吉林省高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内东南大学无显著负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名第31位（较热），短视频曝光以校园风景、学科实力介绍为主，整体偏正面；近年声誉平稳，未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科多达18个，其中A+学科5个（交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A学科4个，A-学科9个；工科实力突出，电子信息类、计算机类、建筑类等专业对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息、计算机、人工智能等专业大类社会热度持续偏高；吉林省2026年普通高考总人数110868人，按近年物理类占比约72.3%估算约80158人，与2025年物理类80421人基本持平，竞争格局稳定；东南大学位于江苏省南京市（华东地区），吉林省考生对华东地区高校认可度较高；该校在吉林省招生计划从44人增至51人，属中等规模招生省份，地域偏好因素影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升趋势、2026年扩招5人（+10.87%）带来的下移压力、学校顶尖层次与工科优势对考生的持续吸引力、以及吉林省考生规模基本稳定等因素，扩招下移压力与学校吸引力上升趋势基本抵消。预测2026年最低位次约875名，区间775–975名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班）
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与电气工程）（电气工程及其自动化、电动载运工程、新能源科学与工程、能源与动力工程）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）（机器人工程、自动化、智能感知工程、智能车辆工程、测控技术与仪器、机械工程）
- 理科试验班（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、系统科学与工程、统计学、应用物理学、物理学、工程力学、密码科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 建筑类（学制5年）（建筑学、城乡规划、风景园林）
- 生物医学工程类（生物医学工程、智能医学工程、生物信息学、生物科学）
- 智慧交通
- 临床医学（学制5年）（5+3一体化培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间775–975名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如775名以内）可重点冲刺吴健雄班、电子信息类、计算机类等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约875名）建议以二档的智慧能源与电气工程、智能制造与智能系统为主，兼报一档专业；位次接近区间上限（约975名）建议以三档专业保底，争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Jilin Province Science Group were 2028 → 1718 → 1063 → 921 → 821, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing rank numbers), with a cumulative increase of about 242 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline rank is about 821, the highest in the past 5 years; the science enrollment plan was 44 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 46 for 2024–2025; the 2026 physics enrollment plan is 51, an increase of 5 (+10.87%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the Top 15–17 in recent years (15th in 2026), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring Jilin candidates; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were no significant negative public opinion events; the university's overall Douyin popularity ranks 31st (relatively hot), with short video exposure mainly featuring campus scenery and discipline strength introductions, overall positive; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are as many as 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines, and 9 A- disciplines; strong engineering strength, with majors in Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Architecture being highly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence remains high; the total number of Jilin Province 2026 general college entrance examination candidates is 110,868, with an estimated 80,158 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 72.3%, roughly the same as the 80,421 in 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province (East China region), and Jilin candidates have a high recognition of universities in East China; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province increased from 44 to 51, making it a medium-scale enrollment province, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the downward pressure from the 2026 expansion of 5 places (+10.87%), the sustained appeal of the university's top tier and engineering advantages to candidates, and the basically stable candidate pool in Jilin Province, the downward pressure from expansion and the upward trend in university appeal roughly offset each other. The predicted 2026 minimum rank is about 875, with a range of 775–975.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Electronic Information Class (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electric Vehicle Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems) (Robotics Engineering, Automation, Intelligent Perception Engineering, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Mechanical Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Systems Science and Engineering, Statistics, Applied Physics, Physics, Engineering Mechanics, Cryptography Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Architecture Class (5-year program) (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Biomedical Engineering Class (Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering, Bioinformatics, Biological Sciences)
- Smart Transportation
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program) (5+3 integrated training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For ranks within the predicted range of 775–975, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. For ranks significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 775), focus on aiming for top majors like Wu Jianxiong Class, Electronic Information Class, and Computer Class; for ranks in the middle of the range (about 875), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering and Smart Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems, while also applying for Tier 1 majors; for ranks near the upper limit (about 975), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety and strive for Tier 2 majors.
